subcodes.first_line: Praise beseemeth and behooveth the Lord of existence, Who through His pure bounty called forth the world of being through His commanding Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک وجود را لایق و سزاست که محض جود عالم هستی را بکلمه امریه ظاهر فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort
